Index.title: PT BERLIAN PALM OIL NUSANTARA
Index.description: Leading agribusiness company in palm oil plantations, CPO production, and sustainable palm oil distribution.

HomePage.hero_desc: PT Berlian Palm Oil Nusantara — Leading Indonesia's palm oil industry with international standards, modern technology, and real commitment to sustainability.
HomePage.about_desc: PT Berlian Palm Oil Nusantara is a pioneer in Indonesia's palm oil industry. We focus not only on production output, but also environmental preservation and community empowerment.
HomePage.sust_desc: Sustainability is not just a goal — it is how we do business every day.
HomePage.cta_desc: Our team is ready to assist you with the best palm oil product solutions. Contact us today for further discussion.

About.hero_desc: More than three decades leading the palm oil industry with a dedication to quality, innovation, and environmental sustainability.

Footer.company_desc: Leading palm oil agribusiness company in Indonesia with international standards and a real commitment to environmental sustainability.
Footer.address: BPON Tower 15th Floor, Jl. Jend. Sudirman Kav. 1, Central Jakarta 10220
Footer.rights: © 2026 PT Berlian Palm Oil Nusantara. All Rights Reserved.

Business.title: Integrated Core Business
Business.desc: From nursery to final processing, BPON manages an efficient, transparent, and sustainable palm oil supply chain.
Business.plantation_desc: Managing 120,000 hectares of land with RSPO standards.
Business.production_desc: Modern mill with a capacity of 2.5 million tons per year.

Products.title: Premium Quality Products
Products.desc: Various palm oil derivative products processed with high technology to meet global industrial needs.
Products.pko_desc: Palm kernel oil for oleochemical industry.
Products.stearin_desc: Raw material for margarine and cosmetic industries.
Products.cert_desc: All our products are certified by independent international institutions.

Sustainability.title: BPON Sustainability
Sustainability.desc: We believe that good business is business that protects the earth and empowers people.
Sustainability.env_desc: NDPE (No Deforestation, No Peat, No Exploitation) policy is strictly implemented in all areas.
Sustainability.soc_desc: Focus on education, health, and infrastructure for communities around the plantation.
Sustainability.gov_desc: Transparency and integrity at every operational level of the company.

News.title: BPON News & Updates
News.desc: Follow the latest developments, achievements, and initiatives from PT Berlian Palm Oil Nusantara.

Contact.title: Lets Work Together
Contact.desc: Our team is ready to help answer questions about products, partnerships, or company information.
